figure.title: RX Master Key Rollover Protocol
figure.purpose: Details the RX side of the multi-step protocol for rolling over the Master Key.

technical_summary: Processes incoming transactions, decrypting and incrementing IVs.
Detects the 'KeyRollMSG.ReqChannel' request from the remote TX, initiating the rollover sequence.
Switches the request stream to the alternate master key and sends an acknowledgment on the write response stream.
Initiates handshakes for the read response stream ('KeyRollMSG.RdRspChannel') and write response stream ('KeyRollMSG.WrRspChannel').
Switches keys sequentially for each stream upon receiving the corresponding remote TX responses.

steps: Process transactions normally until KeyRollMSG is received.
Switch Request stream key and acknowledge.
Handshake and switch Read Response stream key.
Handshake and switch Write Response stream key.

critical_facts: The RX acts as the responsive partner in the master key rollover, switching its decryption keys in strict lockstep with the TX's requests and confirmations.
